title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: NotebookLM has received major updates in 2026 and gained popularity. The platform includes a three-column layout with Sources, Chat, and Studio panels. Studio offers tools for generating reports, slide decks, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio overviews.
